description: A release of a requisition against an active FrameworkAgreement (SCOR S1.3/OE6), the framework call-off branch of sourcing that bypasses the competitive RFQ event. It draws down the framework's remaining value/quantity ceiling, inherits agreed price and terms read-only from the framework, and produces an award-equivalent record straight to PO-ready, skipping RFQ, quotation, negotiation, and comparison. Guarded so cumulative draw-down never exceeds the ceiling and the framework is ACTIVE and within validity.

fields.name: releaseId
fields.label: Call-Off Release No.
fields.purpose: Stable key for one draw-down so the PO, the framework ceiling deduction, and audit entries reference one release; the award-equivalent handle the ordering domain reads.

fields.name: frameworkAgreementId
fields.label: Framework Agreement
fields.validation: must reference an ACTIVE framework within validity with remaining ceiling >= this draw; immutable
fields.purpose: The framework being drawn against; supplies the agreed price and terms and is the ceiling this release deducts from. The link that makes the bypass legitimate.

fields.name: requisitionId
fields.label: Requisition
fields.validation: the FULLY_APPROVED requisition being released; immutable; its lines must be covered by the framework's agreed prices
fields.purpose: The demand the call-off fulfils; carries the requisition identifier into ordering so a framework release traces back to one requisition exactly like a competitive award would.

fields.name: quantity
fields.label: Released Quantity
fields.validation: > 0; cumulative draw-down (framework.consumedQuantity + this) must be <= framework.totalQuantityCeiling; a release exceeding remaining is blocked
fields.purpose: The quantity called off against the framework; the amount deducted from the remaining quantity ceiling and ordered on the resulting PO.

fields.name: agreedPrice
fields.label: Agreed Unit Price
fields.validation: read-only from the framework's agreedPrices for the line; framework currency
fields.purpose: The locked unit price the release uses, inherited read-only from the framework so a call-off cannot drift from the agreed price; the basis for the release value and the PO line price.

fields.name: value
fields.label: Released Value
fields.validation: = quantity x agreedPrice; cumulative (framework.consumedValue + this) must be <= framework.totalValueCeiling; framework currency
fields.purpose: The value drawn down from the framework's value ceiling; the figure that deducts from remaining headroom and becomes the call-off PO value.

fields.name: valueInBase
fields.label: Released Value (Base Currency)
fields.validation: FX-converted from framework currency; graceful degradation to value on FX failure (axiom A12)
fields.purpose: The normalized release value for budget and analytics so framework spend reports in base currency regardless of the agreement currency (axiom A12).

fields.name: paymentTerms
fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.validation: read-only from the framework's agreed terms; one of the PaymentTerms enum
fields.purpose: The payment terms inherited read-only from the framework so the call-off PO and payment schedule use the pre-agreed terms without re-negotiation.

fields.name: deliveryTerms
fields.label: Delivery Terms
fields.validation: read-only from the framework's agreed terms
fields.purpose: The delivery basis inherited read-only from the framework so the call-off carries the pre-agreed delivery expectation into ordering.

fields.name: incoterm
fields.label: Incoterm
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when the framework carries an incoterm (import/goods frameworks)
fields.validation: read-only from the framework's agreed terms; one of Incoterms 2020
fields.purpose: The incoterm inherited read-only from the framework so the call-off PO uses the pre-agreed cost/risk allocation without re-quoting.

fields.name: releasedAt
fields.label: Released At
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when status moves to RELEASED
fields.validation: now() on release; must be within framework validity
fields.purpose: Timestamps when the call-off was released; anchors the draw-down deduction and the handover SLA to PO-ready.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: RELEASED -> PO_READY (linked into a PO-ready package) -> ORDERED (PO issued) | CANCELLED (restores the drawn-down ceiling)
fields.purpose: Tracks the call-off from draw-down to PO; a cancellation restores the consumed value/quantity to the framework so the ceiling stays accurate.

invariants: A1 the requisition identifier the release carries is immutable end to end
A4 budget is soft-checked at requisition and hard-committed at the call-off PO issue
A10 a SUSPENDED supplier's framework cannot back a new release
A12 the release value is normalized to base for budget and analytics
A13 each release and cancellation is audited and broadcast
cumulative draw-down can never exceed the framework value/quantity ceiling (sourcing rule)
a release requires an ACTIVE framework within validity with remaining ceiling >= the draw
